protein_name: Involved in the signal transduction pathway mediated by multiple Wnt genes. Belongs to the DSH family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: beta-catenin binding; frizzled binding; protease binding; protein binding; signaling receptor binding; small GTPase binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: canonical Wnt signaling pathway; intracellular signal transduction; non-canonical Wnt signaling pathway; positive regulation of DNA-templated transcription; positive regulation of JNK cascade; positive regulation of neuron projection arborization; positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II; protein stabilization; regulation of actin cytoskeleton organization; regulation of protein localization; small GTPase-mediated signal transduction; Wnt signaling pathway; Wnt signaling pathway, planar cell polarity pathway
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: dishevelled 3 (homologous to Drosophila dsh); dishevelled segment polarity protein 3; dishevelled, dsh homolog 3; dishevelled, dsh homolog 3 (Drosophila); Dishevelled-3; DRS3; DSH homolog 3; DVL3; KIAA0208; Segment polarity protein dishevelled homolog DVL-3
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 6.18 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
raw_fields.CST Pathways: Hippo Signaling | Microtubule Dynamics | mTOR Signaling | Translation: eIF4E and p70S6K | Wnt/ß-Catenin Signaling
